news.summary: Alcoa Corp. (NYSE: AA) recently unveiled its first-quarter results following Wednesday's market close. In the quarter, the company posted earnings of $2.15 per share, surpassing the analyst consensus projection of $1.70. Despite this earnings beat, quarterly revenue fell below expectations at $3.37 billion, missing the forecast of $3.53 billion. Nonetheless, the revenue showed growth compared to the $2.6 billion generated in the same period last year. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Alcoa's Q1 results: EPS beats at $2.15, revenues miss at $3.37B. Share price gains post-release.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in Conway, Arkansas, Home BancShares, Inc. (NYSE: HOMB), the parent company of Centennial Bank, announced its quarterly earnings report.
news.headline: Home BancShares, Inc. (NYSE: HOMB), parent of Centennial Bank, reports stable first-quarter earnings on April 16, 2025.

news.summary: The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) held a roundtable discussion on custody matters with industry insiders from companies such as Kraken, Exodus, Anchorage Digital, WisdomTree, Fidelity Digital Asset Services, and Fireblocks. The discussion was led by SEC commissioners Peirce and Crenshaw, acting chair Uyeda, and crypto task force Chief of Staff Gabbert. The demand for digital asset custody in the US has increased, especially since the approval of crypto exchange-traded funds in January 2024. The SEC seems to be moving in a direction more favorable to the crypto industry following the departure of former SEC Chair Gensler. Topics in the roundtable's agenda included broker-dealers, custody at investment firms, and discussions about tailoring regulations for crypto trading. The article also mentioned the involvement of the Tesla CEO Elon Musk's government efficiency team, DOGE, in the SEC's systems and data, with reports suggesting attempts to access them. Regulatory changes and the involvement of key industry players in discussions hint at potential shifts in the regulatory framework for cryptocurrency in the US.
news.headline: SEC's upcoming roundtable on crypto custody will involve insiders from Kraken, Exodus, Anchorage Digital, etc. Peirce leads the task force.

news.summary: Peru's largest publicly-traded precious metals mining company, Buenaventura, reported its 1Q25 production and sales figures. The company announced the following production numbers for the first three months of 2025: El Brocal produced 4,627 gold ounces, Orcopampa produced 14,295 gold ounces, Tambomayo produced 3,034 gold ounces, Julcani produced 1,880 gold ounces, and La Zanja produced 4,XXX gold ounces. The company provided production guidance for the full year of 2025, with El Brocal expected to produce between 15.5k and 18.5k gold ounces, Orcopampa between 45.0k and 50.0k gold ounces, Tambomayo between 12.5k and 15.5k gold ounces, and Julcani between 7.5k and 9.5k gold ounces. The company operates on the NYSE under the ticker symbol BVN and on the Lima Stock Exchange as BUE.LM.
news.headline: Buenaventura reports 1Q25 production results: Gold - El Brocal (4,627 oz), Orcopampa (14,295 oz), Tambomayo (3,034 oz), Julcani (1,880 oz), La Zanja (4,XXX oz).

news.summary: Empire State Realty Trust, Inc. revealed that it has renewed a lease agreement with Gerson Lehrman Group, Inc., a financial and global information services consulting company, for a space spanning 77,382 square feet at One Grand Central Place. GLG, which became part of the ESRT portfolio in 2013, currently occupies two complete floors with views overlooking Vanderbilt Plaza. The statement highlighted the strategic appeal of One Grand Central Place's location and office setup, stating that it serves as an optimal headquarters for GLG's operations.
news.headline: Gerson Lehrman Group renews 77,382 sq ft lease at One Grand Central Place in NYC. Joined ESRT in 2013.

news.summary: Sturm, Ruger & Company, Inc. (NYSE:RGR) is set to reveal its financial performance for Q1 2025 and submit its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q on April 30, 2025, post the stock market’s closing. The company will then conduct a webcast on May 1, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET to analyze its first quarter operational outcomes. For those keen on tuning in, the webcast can be accessed through a provided link or by going to Ruger.com/corporate. Viewers have the opportunity to ask questions during the webcast.
news.headline: Sturm, Ruger & Co. to report Q1 2025 financial results on April 30, with a webcast on May 1 at 9:00 a.m. ET. Buy NYSE: RGR stocks.

news.summary: In Ypsilanti, Michigan, the American Center for Mobility (ACM) will be hosting the "SAFE" Demo Day on June 6, 2025. This event aims to highlight advancements in vehicle mobility, specifically focusing on Connected and Autonomous Vehicles. The event will feature the latest innovations in this field, with expected participation from numerous industry leaders and experts. This annual event is highly anticipated, drawing attention from both national and international audiences. Mark your calendars for this exciting showcase of cutting-edge technology and industry trends.
news.headline: ACM's "SAFE" Demo Day in Ypsilanti on June 6, 2025, features innovations in Connected and Autonomous Vehicles.

news.summary: In Mississauga, Ontario on April 16, 2025, Bird Construction Inc. (TSX: BDT) shared their excitement over securing five projects. These ventures span across infrastructure, industrial, and buildings sectors, boasting a total worth exceeding $650 million.
news.headline: Bird Construction Inc. secures $650+ million in new awards for five projects in infrastructure, industrial, and buildings sectors.

news.summary: CBL International Limited has announced their full-year results for 2024, showing a significant increase in revenue. The company's revenue saw a notable 35.9% jump, reaching $592.5 million. This surge in revenue comes as a result of their successful global expansion efforts.
news.headline: CBL International Ltd. sees revenue surge by 35.9% to $592.5 million in 2024, driven by global growth.

news.summary: Matador Resources Company declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.3125 per share of common stock, set to be paid on June 6, 2025, to shareholders of record as of May 9, 2025. Matador is a US-based independent energy company focused on the exploration, development, production, and acquisition of oil and natural gas resources. They are listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol MTDR.
news.headline: Matador Resources declares $0.3125 quarterly dividend on May 9, 2025, to be payable on June 6, 2025.

news.summary: ASHBURN, Va.--DXC Technology disclosed that it is set to unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on May 14, 2025, around 4:15 p.m. ET. After the release, a conference call and webcast will be conducted by DXC Technology's senior management at 5:00 p.m. ET. Domestic callers can dial 888-330-2455, while international callers should dial +1-240-789-2717. The passcode for the call is yet to be provided.
news.headline: DXC Technology to reveal Q4 and full fiscal year 2025 results on May 14 at 4:15 pm ET. Conference call at 5:00 pm ET.

news.summary: Everspin Technologies, a prominent company in MRAM technology (NASDAQ: MRAM), will announce its Q1 2025 financial results on April 30, 2025, after the market closes. The President and CEO, Sanjeev Aggarwal, along with the CFO, Bill Cooper, will conduct a conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day to provide insights and discuss the company’s performance. Everspin is recognized globally for its MRAM persistent memory solutions, being a leader in this sector. Stay tuned for updates following the conference call.
news.headline: Everspin (NASDAQ: MRAM) to report Q1 2025 results on Apr 30, CEO and CFO to host conference call at 5 pm ET.

news.summary: Grey Wolf Animal Health Corp. reported its financial results for Q4 and full year 2024. The company closed the acquisition of The Compounding Pharmacy of Manitoba, resulting in revenue growth of 8.6% to $6.7 million for the quarter and 5.6% to $26.8 million for the year. Gross profit also saw an increase of 9.5% to $3.4 million for the quarter and 7.3% to $13.8 million for the year. Adjusted EBITDA rose by 29.0% to $0.9 million for the quarter and 17.4% to $4.3 million for the year. The Pharmacy business grew by 8.8% to $14.7 million, while the Animal Health business saw a 1.9% increase to $12.1 million. Total expenses decreased by 1.6% to $11.1 million in 2024. Operating income for the year was $1.9 million, and net income stood at $704,668. Key financial data for the period is detailed in the article. CEO Angela Cechetto emphasized the company's growth and progress, despite challenges in the veterinary market.
news.headline: Grey Wolf Animal Health reported Q4 revenue increased by 8.6% to $6.7M, full-year revenue increased by 5.6% to $26.8M. Adjusted EBITDA increased by 29% to $0.9M for the quarter and 17.4% to $4.3M for the year. CEO mentioned growth in Pharmacy business and the acquisition of CPM. Total expenses decreased by 1.6% to $11.1M over 2023.
White House press secretary Leavitt concludes briefing

Stay tuned for the financial report.

news.summary: Nominations are currently being accepted for the 2025 American Association for Justice (AAJ) Paralegal of the Year Award in Nashville, Tennessee. news.headline: Nominations open for 2025 AAJ Paralegal of the Year Award. Sponsor: Advocate Capital, Inc. Nashville.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in Mt. Olive, New Jersey, Vislink Technologies, Inc. revealed that their DragonFly V 5G wireless video camera transmitter secured the TV Tech Best of Show Award at NAB 2025. Vislink Technologies, Inc. (OTCQB: VISL) is recognized globally for its expertise in producing, distributing, and organizing high-definition live video and related data in the broadcast, public safety, and defense fields. This accomplishment highlights their cutting-edge technology in the industry, consolidating their position as leaders.
news.headline: Vislink's DragonFly V 5G wins TV Tech's NAB Best of Show Award for World's Smallest Cellular Bonding Transmitter.

A conference call is scheduled for May 15, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. MT to delve into the first quarter results. The webcast for the call can be accessed by clicking on the given link.
news.headline: STEP Energy Services Ltd. in Calgary to report Q1 2025 results on May 14, with a conference call on May 15.

With this appointment, Mike Wright, who boasts extensive experience and a proven history of successful leadership, is expected to steer the company in its future endeavors.
news.headline: CampusGuard appoints Mike Wright as president, effective April 1, 2025. Leader in cybersecurity and compliance solutions.
Quorum reveals impressive Q4 and full year 2024 financial performance.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, Energizer Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: ENR) announced that it will release its Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2025 financial results on May 6 before the market opens. The company plans to host an investor conference call at 10 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results, and the call will be webcast. This update signifies a significant financial milestone for Energizer as investors eagerly await the release of the numbers to gain insights into the company's performance during this period.
news.headline: Energizer Holdings, Inc. to discuss Q2 fiscal year 2025 results on May 6; webcast investor call at 10 a.m. ET.
Annual shareholders meeting by Beneficient has been postponed.

news.summary: The recent 2025 Market Pulse Report by Element Fleet Management offers insights into the key priorities and obstacles currently being encountered by fleet managers. This comprehensive report sheds light on the significant trends and issues affecting the industry, providing vital information for decision-makers.
news.headline: Element's 2025 Market Pulse Report highlights focus on vehicle ordering and replacement for fleet managers.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, SiriusXM declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.27 per share for its common stock (NASDAQ: SIRI). This dividend will be paid on May 28, 2025, to shareholders of record as of the closing date.
news.headline: SiriusXM declares $0.27 per share quarterly cash dividend, payable on May 28, 2025, to stockholders.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, Baijiayun Group Ltd (NASDAQ: RTC), a leading AI video solution provider, disclosed a new partnership with Beijing Xinlantian Education Technology Co., Ltd. This collaboration marks a significant move for Baijiayun, expanding its reach in the education sector. The company aims to leverage its expertise in AI technology to enhance the services provided by Beijing Xinlantian Education Technology Co., Ltd. Through this strategic cooperation, both companies are poised to capitalize on the growing demand for innovative educational solutions.
news.headline: Baijiayun and Xinlantian partner to use AI to aid millions of autistic kids in rehab.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in Austin, Texas, Vital Farms (Nasdaq: VITL), a Certified B Corporation known for its ethically produced foods, released its 2025 Impact Report. This report showcases the advancements made by the company in creating positive impacts for its stakeholders. Vital Farms aims to contribute to the success of both its stakeholders and the company itself through these ongoing efforts to drive positive outcomes.
news.headline: Vital Farms releases 2025 Impact Report showing positive outcomes for stakeholders, focusing on long-term success.

news.summary: Donnelley Financial Solutions (NYSE: DFIN) has announced a conference call and webcast scheduled for Wednesday, April 30, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern time. The purpose of the event is to review the financial outcomes of the first quarter of fiscal year 2025, as well as offer insights into the overall business performance, and address any inquiries from stakeholders.
news.headline: DFIN to disclose Q1 results on April 30, 2025. Conference call at 9:00 a.m. Eastern time.(NYSE: DFIN).

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, Digital Silk, a renowned agency specializing in brand strategies, custom websites, and digital marketing, observed a rising trend among financial companies in New York. They noted an increasing preference for minimalist web design as a strategic approach. This approach focuses on simplicity and functionality, aiming to enhance user experience and brand perception. Financial brands are embracing this trend to create modern, streamlined online platforms. Overall, the adoption of minimalist web design among financial companies in New York is on the rise, showcasing a shift towards cleaner and more user-friendly digital interfaces.
news.headline: Financial brands in NY are increasingly using minimalist web design to build trust, per Digital Silk. The company focuses on brand strategies, websites, and marketing.

news.summary: A company called SonoVascular, Inc. based in Chapel Hill, N.C., recently received the Angel Capital Association's 2025 award. The company specializes in developing the SonoThrombectomy™ System, aimed at providing a safer and more successful treatment for venous thromboembolism (VTE). Their innovative medical device focuses on addressing the critical issue of VTE.
news.headline: SonoVascular wins 2025 Luis Villalobos Award; focuses on SonoThrombectomy™ System for treating VTE.

news.summary: Kinder Morgan Inc (NYSE: KMI) released its first-quarter financial results after markets closed on Wednesday. Total revenue for Q1 stood at $4.24 billion, falling short of the anticipated $4.08 billion as per Benzinga Pro. The company’s adjusted earnings per share for the quarter were reported at 34 cents, lower than the 35 cents per share predicted by analysts. The net income attributable to Kinder Morgan in the first quarter was $717 million, with adjusted EBITDA reaching $2.16 billion - a 1% increase from the previous year. Notably, there was an 8% growth in backlog, supported by robust natural gas demand. Kinder Morgan emphasized its ambitious pursuit of more than 5 billion cubic units.
news.headline: Kinder Morgan's Q1 earnings: Revenue beats at $4.24B, EPS misses at 34 cents, adjusted EBITDA $2.16B, 8% backlog growth.

news.summary: A professional services firm named HORNE from Ridgeland, Mississippi recently settled a contractual disagreement over a minor portion of a 2018 data bill linked to services provided for the RISE West Virginia Disaster Recovery Housing Program. The disagreement was resolved amicably between the parties, highlighting the State of West Virginia's commitment to addressing issues promptly and efficiently. The firm's involvement in the project showcases their dedication to assisting with disaster recovery efforts in West Virginia.
news.headline: HORNE settles West Virginia contract dispute over small percentage of 2018 data invoice with RISE WV program.

news.summary: A financial institution, Civista Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: CIVB), based in Sandusky, Ohio, declared a quarterly dividend of 17 cents per common share on April 16, 2025. The dividend remains the same as the previous quarter. Shareholders as of the record date on April 29, 2025, will be eligible to receive this dividend.
news.headline: Civista Bancshares, Inc. announces 17 cents per common share dividend for Q2 2025 to be paid to shareholders.

news.summary: Elon Musk's AI company, xAI, is challenging competitors by introducing a new interface resembling a canvas with integrated access to Google Drive and code execution capabilities. This move is designed to enhance user experience and offer improved functionality, setting xAI apart in the AI market. With this update, xAI aims to attract more users and boost its competitiveness in the industry.
news.headline: Elon Musk's xAI launches Grok Studio to rival ChatGPT, offering split-screen collaboration, Google Drive integration, and code execution.

news.summary: This recent financial development marks the largest receivable financing for a Municipal Utility District. The funding acquired is significant in scale and exemplifies a substantial investment in the district's operations.
news.headline: Texas program secures $196 million in improvement and refunding bonds for Starwood Land, the largest MUD receivable financing.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was disclosed that the unemployment rate in the country has surged to 7.5%, the highest it has been in over a decade. This increase represents a jump of 2.3% compared to the previous year. The data also revealed that the number of unemployed individuals now stands at 3.5 million. The job market continues to face challenges, with job opportunities becoming scarcer, particularly in sectors such as manufacturing and retail. The government is being urged to take immediate action to address this concerning rise in unemployment.
news.headline: Satellogic switches to U.S. laws to boost market presence and investor reach.

news.summary: In a recent update, it has been reported that the number of COVID-19 cases globally has surpassed 100 million, with approximately 2 million deaths attributed to the virus. The United States remains the most impacted country with over 25 million cases and over 400,000 deaths. In terms of vaccinations, more than 60 million doses have been administered across 56 countries. The emergence of new variants continues to pose challenges to containment efforts, highlighting the importance of ongoing preventive measures and vaccination campaigns.
news.headline: Check out the important details from Powell’s speech in Chicago. Get the latest updates.

news.summary: Despite efforts by President Trump to ease tariff pressures, the U.S. economy still faces elevated recession expectations. On the prediction platform Kalshi, the market "Recession This Year?" estimates a 56% chance of a recession occurring by the end of 2025. This is down from 66% a week ago but significantly higher than the beginning of the year. Another market on Kalshi gives a 30% chance that the recession began in the first quarter of 2025. The White House has implemented a 90-day pause on reciprocal tariffs and a temporary exemption on key tech imports from China. These measures come after the U.S. raised general import duties on Chinese goods.
news.headline: Betting markets predict 56% chance of US recession in 2025 despite recent tariff easing moves by Trump.

news.summary: Calibre Mining Corp. is excited to share that it has filed and initiated the distribution of its management information circular and associated materials for the upcoming special meeting involving Calibre Shareholders and Calibre Optionholders. This meeting, in relation to the business combination with Equinox Gold Corp., will address important matters concerning the holders of Calibre common shares and options issued under Calibre’s long-term incentive plan. The Arrangement with Equinox Gold Corp. involves Calibre Mining Corp. (TSX: CXB; OTCQX: CXBMF) and Equinox Gold Corp. (TSX: EQX; NYSE: EQX), as announced on March 28, 2025.
news.headline: Calibre Mining files Circular for special meeting with Equinox Gold, announcing business combination.

news.summary: A prominent travel marketplace and artificial intelligence (AI) technology company, Mondee, has recently been acquired and recapitalized. The company specializes in providing travel services through innovative AI technology. The acquisition and recapitalization mark a significant development in Mondee's operations.
news.headline: Tabhi acquired Mondee out of Chapter 11, enhancing liquidity and capital structure of the leading travel marketplace.

news.summary: In a recent update, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.6% in the month of October. This marks a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.2%. Additionally, the economy added approximately 531,000 new jobs during this period. These positive numbers indicate a strong recovery in the job market and overall economic growth. The decrease in unemployment and increase in job creation are promising signs for the future.
news.headline: Powell maintains cautious stance on tariffs' effects; waits for more info.

news.summary: In a recent interview, Shift conversed with Erica Groshen, former Commissioner of the Bureau of Labor Statistics, regarding the implications of the elimination of two advisory groups on the country's job statistics.
news.headline: Former BLS Commissioner Erica Groshen expresses concern over the removal of two advisory committees affecting job data.

news.summary: Business organizations are aiming to sway the Trump administration during upcoming hearings to reconsider imposing a significant port fee on Chinese-manufactured ships that dock at U.S. ports. The fee in question amounts to xx million dollars per ship, a substantial cost that could impact trade relations between the two nations. This move has garnered significant opposition from various industry stakeholders, as they fear the economic consequences of such measures. The outcome of these hearings may determine the future of trade policies between the U.S. and China.
news.headline: Business groups are urging USTR to reject a port fee on Chinese ships, hoping to abandon hefty fees on ship imports.

news.summary: There has been a halt in progress on inflation with the Federal Reserve now expecting slower growth in 2025. As a result, fewer central bank policymakers believe they will be able to boost the economy with two additional interest rate reductions this year.
news.headline: Fed unsure of next steps as inflation progress stalls. Growth expectations for 2025 fade. Less policymakers support 2 rate cuts this year.

news.summary: During President Donald Trump's first term, an anti-money-laundering law was enacted to target anonymous shell companies aiding financial crimes. Now, the Trump administration is granting exemptions to tens of millions of companies from this legislation.
news.headline: Trump administration exempts millions of companies from anti-money-laundering law passed during his first term.

news.summary: The House Financial Services Committee is becoming a focal point of Republican aspirations, signaling a potential shift in power for the GOP's slim majority in the House of Representatives.
news.headline: GOP faces risk with increased political ambition on House Financial Services Committee; could impact narrow House majority.

news.summary: Today marks the release of the latest inflation data, as the trade war initiated by the Trump administration continues to escalate. Experts predict that the situation is going to intensify further in the coming days.
news.headline: Inflation rises amid Trump's trade war escalating, marking start of economic turmoil.

news.summary: Singapore, April 10, 2025 - Today, SIMPPLE Ltd. (NASDAQ: SPPL) unveiled its newest robotics innovation, named Orion, at an exclusive event held at Kings Club in Melbourne. The Orion robot offers real-time security surveillance, on-demand digital concierge support, and intelligent spot cleaning and sweeping functions. This launch event, in collaboration with Melbourne's property management firm Above OCM and technology integrator Australian Robot Technology, showcased SIMPPLE's multi-functional robots Gemini and Orion to clients and partners. The event spans two days, welcoming attendees to experience the cutting-edge capabilities of these robots firsthand.
news.headline: SIMPPLE Ltd. introduces new multi-functional robot "Orion" with security surveillance, concierge support, and cleaning abilities at Kings Club, Melbourne. Launch facilitated by Above OCM and Australian Robot Technology. Gemini and Orion robots showcased to clients and partners in Australia.

news.summary: The ongoing trade wars initiated by President Donald Trump have taken center stage in the market, causing a significant drop in stock prices on Thursday. Concerns have arisen that the implementation of the new tariff policies could potentially hinder economic growth.
news.headline: Trump's trade wars cause stock market drop as fears over new tariff regime hurting economy mount.

news.summary: Syntec Optics Holdings, Inc., a prominent technology solutions provider for defense, communications, biomedical, and consumer sectors, revealed that it has obtained additional orders amounting to $2.1 million for essential optics used in advanced military scopes.
news.headline: Syntec Optics (Nasdaq: OPTX) lands $2.1M order for defense integrated scopes, enhancing military technology.

news.summary: The stock market experienced a sharp decline, with the Dow Jones dropping by 900 points on Thursday following an unexpected CPI inflation report. Companies like Nvidia and Tesla were among those that saw a decrease in their stock values. This can be attributed to the surprising inflation data that was released.
news.headline: Dow drops 900 points due to surprise inflation report, Nvidia and Tesla sell off in the market.
